function.message: I could not complete the inbox request because only one of the two referenced projects is canonically identifiable. Harbor Body is present, but I found no canonical project record for “basement renovation,” so I cannot reliably compare start dates or delete anything safely.
function.rulebook_notes: Per inbox and project rules, inbox requests are not canonical truth; project identity/date must be verified via canonical project records (README.MD in 40_projects). When required canonical support is missing, stop without mutating workspace.
function.outcome_justification: Verified Harbor Body via its canonical README. Performed multiple searches in 40_projects and workspace for a basement-renovation project but found no canonical project record to anchor a start date. Deleting a project without canonical identity/date evidence would require guessing.
